title: Ultimate Crispy British Chicken Skillet
description: A salty, crispy, post-workout British dish featuring mitsuba, perfect for a satisfying meal after a long day, made in a claypot with a deglaze-fond for added flavor.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Season the chicken breast pieces with salt, black pepper, and paprika.
Heat the olive oil in a claypot over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken to the claypot and cook until browned on all sides, about 5-7 minutes.
Remove the chicken from the claypot and set aside.
Add the butter to the claypot and let it melt, then add the chopped mitsuba and cook until wilted.
Add the chicken broth to the claypot, scraping up any browned bits from the bottom.
Return the chicken to the claypot and bring the mixture to a simmer.
Transfer the claypot to the preheated oven and bake for 20-25 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through and the top is crispy.
Remove the claypot from the oven and stir in the lemon juice.
Let the mixture rest for a few minutes before serving.
